title: Extract Named Entities from Model Output
description: Parse entity lists from model text reliably.
problem: The model returns: 'Companies mentioned: Apple, Google, Microsoft.' Write extract_companies(text) that returns a list of company names from that format. Handle variations like 'Companies: X, Y' or 'Organizations: A, B, C.'
starter_code:

hint: Use re.search to find the pattern, then split by comma and strip each result. Remove trailing periods.
